programmes.show_description: A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!

programmes.show_name: The Wham Bam Easter Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
With just five years as a partnership, Andrew and George produced these 10 chart hits in the mid 1980s. George went on to greater things, but what happened to lovely Andrew?

programmes.show_name: The Wham Bam Easter Party Week!

Two hours of the biggest party tunes - all from 1984. Including Wham!, Madonna, Nik Kershaw, Chaka Khan and Frankie Goes to Hollywood. Push pineapple, shake the tree!

programmes.show_description: Bucks Fizz founder members Cheryl, Mike and Jay are back as 'The Fizz', and these guys still know how to start an 80s party! It's time for a celebration!

Non-stop '80s rock and power ballads - all night! From Queen, Bon Jovi and Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler and Tina Turner.
